creator: pauls@bgp.nu
text:
This port tries to fetch its distfile from all sorts of places
	that don't have it.

Fix: 

ftp://ftp.zedz.net/pub/crypto/crypto/LIBS/rsa/rsaref20.1996.tar.Z
	That is where the replay.com stuff ended up - note that both
	the hostname and path are different from what's in the Makefile.
How-To-Repeat: 
	cd /usr/ports/security/rsaref && make
